notes: Conservative functional check: output should reflect barrel shift of input according to ctrl when observed after any latency.
checks.pass_condition: When in and ctrl are stable, out eventually equals the 8-bit value obtained by rotating in left by the amount indicated by ctrl (0-7). No fixed cycle count is assumed.
checks.trigger_condition: Whenever a stimulus program writes new values to in and ctrl.

notes: Guardrail: output must not become high-impedance or unknown after stimulus.
checks.pass_condition: Out remains defined (not X or Z) during the observation window after inputs are applied.
checks.trigger_condition: Whenever inputs are driven and the design is not in reset.
